message:
fix(ui): add missing framer-motion import and scope spectrum array in optimization-card

The OptimizationCard component uses `motion.h3` (line 34) for interactive
hover color transitions on the optimization name, but was missing the
required `import { motion } from "framer-motion"` statement. This commit
adds the import to resolve the dependency.

Additionally, moves the `spectrum` color palette array from module-level
scope into the `useMemo` callback where it is the sole consumer. This
improves encapsulation by co-locating the constant with its only usage
site and avoids a persistent module-level allocation for data that is
only needed during the memoized deterministic color computation based
on the optimization name's character code hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
